summary: 45 tests passed, 100.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: extract_video_id() handles: standard watch URLs, youtu.be short URLs, embed URLs, mobile URLs, bare 11-char video IDs
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented extract_video_id() with VIDEO_ID_PATTERNS supporting all 5 formats. Tests: test_standard_watch_url, test_short_url, test_embed_url, test_mobile_url, test_bare_video_id, test_url_with_extra_query_params, test_url_with_www_prefix, test_bare_id_with_whitespace, test_id_with_hyphens_and_underscores (9 tests all passing).

completion_promises.criterion_text: extract_video_id() raises InvalidURLError for unrecognized formats
completion_promises.evidence: InvalidURLError raised when no pattern matches. Tests: test_invalid_url, test_empty_string, test_too_short_id, test_too_long_id, test_invalid_characters, test_non_youtube_video_url (6 tests all passing).

completion_promises.criterion_text: VideoInfo dataclass contains: video_id, title, channel, channel_id, duration_seconds, duration_formatted, description_snippet, view_count, upload_date, thumbnail_url, has_captions, has_auto_captions, available_languages
completion_promises.evidence: VideoInfo dataclass defined with all 13 required fields. Tests: test_is_dataclass, test_all_fields_present (exact field set match), test_can_instantiate (3 tests all passing).

completion_promises.criterion_text: YouTubeClient.get_video_info() uses asyncio.to_thread() for non-blocking execution
completion_promises.evidence: get_video_info() calls await asyncio.to_thread(self._sync_get_info, video_url, video_id). Tests: test_get_video_info_returns_video_info, test_get_video_info_uses_to_thread (verifies to_thread called with _sync_get_info), test_get_video_info_invalid_url (3 tests all passing).

completion_promises.criterion_text: CancelledError is caught, logged, and re-raised (never swallowed)
completion_promises.evidence: try/except asyncio.CancelledError in get_video_info() logs info and re-raises. Test: test_cancelled_error_is_reraised confirms CancelledError propagates (1 test passing).
_sync_get_info catches yt_dlp.utils.DownloadError and raises VideoNotFoundError with 'from e' chaining. Tests: test_download_error_mapped, test_none_info_raises_video_not_found (2 tests all passing).

completion_promises.criterion_text: _format_duration() handles None, seconds-only, minutes, and hours
completion_promises.evidence: _format_duration() returns '0:00' for None/0, 'M:SS' for minutes, 'H:MM:SS' for hours. Tests: test_none_returns_zero, test_zero_seconds, test_seconds_only, test_minutes_and_seconds, test_hours_minutes_seconds, test_exactly_one_hour, test_exactly_one_minute (7 tests all passing).

completion_promises.criterion_text: _truncate() truncates description to 500 chars with ellipsis
completion_promises.evidence: _truncate() returns text unchanged if <= max_length, otherwise truncates to max_length-3 + '...'. Tests: test_short_text_unchanged, test_exact_length_unchanged, test_long_text_truncated_with_ellipsis, test_empty_string (4 tests all passing).
Created src/services/__init__.py with docstring. Test: test_services_init_exists verifies file path exists (1 test passing).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Code passes ruff check and mypy
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check src/services/ tests/test_youtube_client.py: 'All checks passed!'. mypy src/services/youtube_client.py: 'Success: no issues found'. Added mypy override for yt_dlp missing stubs in pyproject.toml.
